message:
fix: File size compliance + Zig 0.15.2 compatibility fixes

Agent 1: Split assign.zig (502→416 lines, +assign_helpers.zig 91 lines)
Agent 2: Fixed ArrayList API, string literal type inference, class mutability
Agent 3: Independent verification - all claims accurate

Fixes:
- Extract helper functions to assign_helpers.zig (84 line margin) ✅
- ArrayList.items for iteration/indexing (Zig 0.15.2) ✅
- String literal type detection (*const [N:0]u8) ✅
- Class instance mutability (var vs const) ✅
- zip() ArrayList length access ✅

Test results: 48/93 passing (52%, +2 from baseline 46/92)
File sizes: All < 500 lines ✅
Build: Clean, no errors ✅
